name: Stickman Fight
description: Do you like fighter games? Do you enjoy stickman games? Are you ready for the stick fight extreme Stickman Fight?? The hero of the casual stickman Stick Fight games is returning. The fight game with endless waves of ninja enemies hordes will test your brawl and survival skills. Become the ultimate stickman warrior boss in this free funny and hypercasual battle royale game. Have fun. Play stickman games on iyigames.com. Stick fight the endless horde of stickmen to break your own records or until your perish in the survival arena. Hit with your fist but also
tags: Action, Adventure, Best, Fight, Fighting, Fun, HTML5, Mobile, Stickman, WebGL
